validation_rules.requirement: Expenses must relate to freelance illustration work
validation_rules.notes: Art supplies, software, and studio costs qualify; personal groceries do not
Only one valid receipt allowed per transaction
Need bank statement match for verification

validation_rules.requirement: Receipts with unreadable or missing totals
validation_rules.notes: Frank requires legible amount for Schedule C filing
Flag for Uncle Frank — may still be deductible but note delay

context: Rules used during freelance expense validation for Schedule C tax preparation. Uncle Frank Whitfield reviews annually.
